lines.raw: Lesson 17 | 第17课
How do you do? | 你好！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: What are Michael Baker and Jeremy Short's jobs?
lines.chinese: 迈克尔·贝克和杰里米·肖特的职业是什么？
lines.raw: What are Michael Baker and Jeremy Short's jobs? | 迈克尔·贝克和杰里米·肖特的职业是什么？

lines.english: Come and meet our employees Mr.Richards.
lines.chinese: 理查兹先生，来见见我们的员工。
lines.raw: Come and meet our employees Mr.Richards. | 理查兹先生，来见见我们的员工。
Thank you Mr. Jackson. | 谢谢你，杰克逊先生。
This is Nicola Grey | 这是尼古拉·格雷
and this is Claire Taylor. | 这是克莱尔·泰勒。
How do you do? | 你好！
Those women are very hard-working. | 那些女士们非常勤奋。
What are their jobs? | 她们的职业是什么？
They're keyboard operators. | 她们是键盘操作员。
This is Michael Baker | 这是迈克尔·贝克
and this is Jeremy Short. | 这是杰里米·肖特。
How do you do? | 你好！
They aren't very busy! | 他们不太忙！
What are their jobs? | 他们的职业是什么？
They're sales reps. | 他们是销售代表。
They're very lazy. | 他们很懒惰。
Who is this young man? | 这个年轻人是谁？
This is Jim. | 这是吉姆。

lines.chinese: 他是我们的办公室助理。
lines.raw: He's our office assistant. | 他是我们的办公室助理。
